title: Ven's Kanade Plushie!
description: A plushie of Kanade Yoisaki because I like Kanade way too much
body:
Do you ever love Kanade just a tad bit too much? Would you like for her to save you from certain death in your Minecraft world? Well, look no further than this texture pack! This texture pack retextures the Totem of Undying into a 3D model of- okay i give up

# the silly (real)
turn your totem into kanade!

(this kanade)
![the kanade that teh totem turns into](https://static.wikitide.net/projectsekaiwiki/thumb/9/9e/Kanade_21_trained_art.png/1920px-Kanade_21_trained_art.png)

some stuff renamed!
- Totem of Undying -> Kanade Plushie
- the achievement "Postmortal" -> "Blessed by Music"
  - also changes the description
- the subtitle for using totem -> "Saved by Kanade"
- pop sound changed to the crit. flick sound (This can be disabled by downloading the older version. There are no visual changes between the two.)
